product.name: OrganiHaus Cotton Rope Basket for Shelf - Woven Storage Basket for Organizing, Closet & Toy Storage - Blue/White - 15x9x10
features: PERFECT FOR NURSERY AND KIDS ROOM ORGANIZATION — Soft, woven cotton rope in a gentle two-tone palette designed to complement nursery shelves, baby room built-ins, and kids bedroom storage. Great for storing diapers, baby blankets, toys, and books — organized, within reach, and easy on the eye.

HANDWOVEN COTTON ROPE CONSTRUCTION — Each basket is crafted from thick, soft cotton rope with a sturdy coiled base that holds its shape on any shelf. Hidden handles blend seamlessly into the weave for a clean, minimal look while making it easy to pull the basket in and out.

FITS STANDARD SHELVES — At 15x9x10", this basket is sized to fit most cube organizers, bookcases, and open shelving units. Spacious enough to store folded blankets, towels, toys, shoes, or pantry items without bulging or losing shape.

ORGANIZE ANY ROOM IN THE HOUSE — Use it in the closet, bedroom, living room, nursery, playroom, pantry, or entryway. Great for corralling toys, laundry, linen, or daily clutter — anywhere you need a basket that looks as good as it works.

BUILT TO LAST, EASY TO LOVE — Thick cotton rope construction that holds its shape wash after wash. OrganiHaus designs every product to be used daily, not just admired — sturdy enough for kids rooms, closets, and everything in between.
